name: Trek Metals Limited
analysis: TKM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.1800, stop A$0.1634, target A$0.2000 (1.20:1) — then trail it.
